name: superlazy-cc
description: Three-command, critic-gated development pipeline: superlazy-brainstorm (Fable drafts the spec+plan, Sol/Codex gates both seams, hash-bound approval sidecar, HTML plan review, hard stop), superlazy-build (verifies the sidecar and skips straight to execution, one-pass re-bless on stale plans, per-task model routing, Sol code-critic on the diff), and superlazy-review (Opus + Sol two-model adversarial code review). Approvals are written only by the critic script and carry the hashes of the exact bytes they approved. Drives the superpowers-extended-cc skills (must be installed/enabled).
